name: arc-mcp
description: Optional MCP adapter for ARC research tools.

interface.shortDescription: Optional MCP access to ARC research tools
interface.longDescription: An explicit opt-in MCP adapter for ARC. Install the ARC plugin for the default Skill and CLI workflows; install this companion only when the host needs MCP tool discovery.
defaultPrompt: Use ARC MCP to inspect a paper
Use ARC MCP to build a research domain
